title: 2025 CMI Annual Meeting attracts largest group ever
description: CMI researchers met for the 2025 CMI Annual Meeting highlight
text:
CMI researchers met for the 2025 CMI Annual Meeting highlight
Achievement
The Critical Materials Innovation Hub held its annual meeting at Idaho National Laboratory, attracting more than 200 members of industry, universities, national laboratories and the U.S. Department of Energy. The event welcomed CMI Team members and Affiliates, and included plenary sessions, technical meetings and other scheduled and informal meetings.
